title: Artificial Intelligence Truth Stack
summary: AI is the study and practice of systems that can learn patterns, generate outputs, act on goals, and assist with decision-making.
starterPack: Start with the Stanford AI Index and arXiv.
Read Stuart Russell and Melanie Mitchell.
Use DeepMind, Anthropic, and The Batch for context.

tiers.description: The core ideas that make AI legible.

items.name: AI is mostly statistical learning
items.description: Modern systems learn patterns from data and optimisation.

items.name: Training and inference differ
items.description: Building a model is not the same as deploying it.

items.name: Evaluation is essential
items.description: Performance must be measured on real tasks and failure modes.
